title: dryoathyrium coreanum
intro: Dryoathyrium coreanum, also known as Korean wood fern or Corean wood fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dryoathyrium coreanum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures.
